case_title: ROBERT M. DUNCAN et al VS. BENZ TRANSPORTATION INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUNCAN, ROBERT M. DUNCAN, CARY HEARING SET FOR APR-22-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BENZ TRANSPORTATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN PRESIDENT LINES, LTD
ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-525965 WITH CASE CGC-12-517514; ALL FURTHER ENTRIES UNDER CASE CGC-12-517514
PARTIES/ATTORNEYS FROM CONSOLIDATED CASE NUMBER 525965 ADDED TO LEAD CASE NUMBER 517514 FOR MAILING OF COURT NOTICES.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. VERIFIED APPLICATION OF RACHEL S. ANDERSON TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFFS ROBERT DUNCAN AND CARY DUNCAN- THE MOTION IS OFF CALENDAR PER CCP 1005 AND 12C BECAUSE SERVICE WAS UNTIMELY. THE PAPERS WERE MAIL SERVED ON MARCH 27, 2013 AND THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO ADD 5 CALENDAR DAYS FOR THE MAIL SERVICE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-22-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-22-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. CONSOLIDATED WITH #517514. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUNCAN, ROBERT M. DUNCAN, CARY SERVED JAN-11-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BENZ TRANSPORTATION INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-10-2013 CONTINUED TO MAY-22-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUNCAN, ROBERT M. DUNCAN, CARY AS TO DEFENDANT BENZ TRANSPORTATION INC. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
VERIFIED APPLICATION OF DOUGLAS B. CANNON AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFFS ROBERT DUNCAN AND CARY DUNCAN - The motion is off calendar per CCP 1005 and 12c because service was untimely. The papers were mail served on March 27, 2013 and the moving party failed to add 5 calendar days for the mail service. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
VERIFIED APPLICATION OF RACHEL S. ANDERSON TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFFS ROBERT DUNCAN AND CARY DUNCAN- The motion is off calendar per CCP 1005 and 12c because service was untimely. The papers were mail served on March 27, 2013 and the moving party failed to add 5 calendar days for the mail service. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To May-22-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
